title: Memory page is a packet-to-code workflow
summary: The viewer Memory page should show actual repo memory packets, not helper graph nodes. It should make the user workflow clear: search/filter packets, see reusable vs code linked vs needs path coverage, select one packet,
body: The viewer Memory page should show actual repo memory packets, not helper graph nodes. It should make the user workflow clear: search/filter packets, see reusable vs code-linked vs needs-path coverage, select one packet, and inspect its summary/evidence/code links beside the list. Row labels should point to useful file/symbol targets instead of raw graph node names.
